## --- Core Framework & Servers ---##
fastapi
uvicorn
python-multipart
pywebview

## --- Audio Processing ---##
kokoro-onnx
huggingface_hub
numpy
soundfile
pydub

## --- Text Processing & Utilities ---##
requests
pydantic
beautifulsoup4
lxml
num2words

## --- Document Parsing ---##
ebooklib
PyMuPDF

## --- CJK Voice Support ---##
misaki[zh]
fugashi
unidic-lite
jaconv
jamdict
